title: bauhinia cheilantha
intro: Bauhinia cheilantha, also known as the 'yellow bauhinia', is a plant species belonging to the orchid family and native to tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, Bauhinia cheilantha has been used in medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bauhinia cheilantha is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to relieve pain and inflammation.
